brief.speaker: grayson
brief.text: The age profile. Give me the minimum, maximum, and average age of the workforce. Three numbers. One query.

expected.sql: SELECT MIN(age), MAX(age), AVG(age) FROM census_1890

hints.text: Grayson: 'Values don't match. Min, max, and average — in some order.'
Grayson: 'Three aggregate expressions separated by commas.'
Grayson: 'Pick MIN, MAX, and AVG — each on the age column.'

success.speaker: grayson
success.text: Youngest a newborn. Oldest in the nineties. Average around thirty. The investors like numbers.
